--- title: Two-Factor ANOVA subtitle: Practice Problems for PSY 241 author: Guenther, Benjamin A. project: type: website output-dir: docs format: html: html-math-method: mathjax self-contained-math: false embed-resources: false jupyter: python3 --- Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with $\alpha = {0.01}$ to analyze the following data


## Full Group Summary Data
$T_{A1B1} = {306} \quad M_{A1B1} = {43.71}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {7.43} \quad n_{A1B1} = {7}$
$T_{A1B2} = {269} \quad M_{A1B2} = {38.43}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {25.71} \quad n_{A1B2} = {7}$
$T_{A1B3} = {225} \quad M_{A1B3} = {32.14}\quad SS_{A1B3} = {64.86} \quad n_{A1B3} = {7}$
$T_{A2B1} = {244} \quad M_{A2B1} = {34.86}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {12.86} \quad n_{A2B1} = {7}$
$T_{A2B2} = {236} \quad M_{A2B2} = {33.71}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {57.43} \quad n_{A2B2} = {7}$
$T_{A2B3} = {311} \quad M_{A2B3} = {44.43}\quad SS_{A2B3} = {87.71} \quad n_{A2B3} = {7}$
$\Sigma X^2 = {61481}$
$G = {1591}$

## Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations

Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: $df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}$

$df_{total} = N - 1$

$df_{total} = {42} - 1$

$df_{total} = {41}$


$df_{between} = k - 1$

$df_{between} = {6} - 1$

$df_{between} = {5}$


$df_{within} = N - K$

$df_{within} = {42} - {6}$

$df_{within} = {36}$


Calculate the Sum of Squares: $SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}$

$SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{total} = {61481} - \frac{1591^2}{42}$

$SS_{total} = {61481} - \frac{2531281}{42}$

$SS_{total} = {61481} - {60268.6}$

$SS_{total} = {1212.4}$


$SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}$

$SS_{within} = {7.43 + 25.71 + 64.86 + 12.86 + 57.43 + 87.71}$

$SS_{within} = {256.0}$


$SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}$

$SS_{between} = {1212.4} - {256.0}$

$SS_{between} = {956.4}$


note: the other way to calculate $SS_{betwen}$ is:

$SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$




## Stage 2 calculations for $Factor_A$

Summary Data for Factor_A
$T_{A_1} = {800} \quad n_{A_1} = {21}$
$T_{A_2} = {791} \quad n_{A_2} = {21}$

State the Hypotheses
$H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2$
$H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2$

partition df for $Factor_A$

$df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1$

$df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1$

$df_{Factor_A} = {1}$


The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {7.4}, \alpha = {0.01}$

Partition the SS for $Factor_A$

Calculate $SS_{Factor_A}$

$\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{800}^2}{21} + \frac{{791}^2}{21}} - \frac{{1591}^2}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{640000}}{21} + \frac{{625681}}{21}} - \frac{{2531281}}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {{30476.19} + {29794.33}} - {60268.6}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {60270.52} - {60268.6}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {1.92}$

Mean Squares for ${Factor_A}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{1.92}{1}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = {1.92}$

Calculate the F-Ratio for ${Factor_A}$

$F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}$

$F_{Factor_A} = \frac{1.92}{7.11}$

$F_{Factor_A} = {0.27}$


Calculate $\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{1.92}{{1212.4} - {75.75} - {878.73}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{1.92}{257.92}$

$\eta_p^2 = {0.01}$

The results:

fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,

$F({1}, {36}) = {0.27}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}$

## Stage 2 calculations for $Factor_B$

Summary Data for Factor_B
$T_{B_1} = {550} \quad n_{B_1} = {14}$
$T_{B_2} = {505} \quad n_{B_2} = {14}$
$T_{B_3} = {536} \quad n_{B_3} = {14}$

State the Hypotheses
$H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3$
$H_1:$ At least one mean is different

partition df for $Factor_B$

$df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1$

$df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1$

$df_{Factor_B} = {2}$


The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}$

Partition the SS for $Factor_B$

Calculate $SS_{Factor_B}$

$\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{550}^2}{14} + \frac{{505}^2}{14} + \frac{{536}^2}{14}} - \frac{{1591}^2}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{302500}}{14} + \frac{{255025}}{14} + \frac{{287296}}{14}} - \frac{{2531281}}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {{21607.14} + {18216.07} + {20521.14}} - {60268.6}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {60344.35} - {60268.6}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {75.75}$

Mean Squares for ${Factor_B}$

$MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}$

$MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{75.75}{2}$

$MS_{Factor_B} = {37.88}$

Calculate the F-Ratio for ${Factor_B}$

$F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}$

$F_{Factor_B} = \frac{37.88}{7.11}$

$F_{Factor_B} = {5.33}$


Calculate $\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{75.75}{{1212.4} - {1.92} - {878.73}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{75.75}{331.75}$

$\eta_p^2 = {0.23}$

The results:

reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,

$F({2}, {36}) = {5.33}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.23}$

## Stage 2 calculations for the $AxB$ interaction


State the Hypotheses
$H_0:$ There is no AxB interation
$H_1:$ There is an AxB interaction

Partition df for the interaction

$df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}$

$df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}$

$df_{AxB} = {2}$



The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}$

Partition the SS for $AxB$

Calculate $SS_{AxB}$

$SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}$

$SS_{AxB} = {956.4} - {1.92} - {75.75}$

$SS_{AxB} = {878.73}$

Mean Squares for ${AxB}$

$MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}$

$MS_{AxB} = \frac{878.73}{2}$

$MS_{AxB} = {439.36}$

Calculate the F-Ratio for ${AxB}$

$F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}$

$F_{AxB} = \frac{439.36}{7.11}$

$F_{AxB} = {61.79}$


Calculate $\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{878.73}{{1212.4} - {1.92} - {75.75}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{878.73}{1134.73}$

$\eta_p^2 = {0.77}$

The results:

reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,

$F({2}, {36}) = {61.79}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.77}$
